notes: ungetch pushes a key code back so the next getch returns it, LIFO across calls (KEY_UP, then 'B', then 'A'); flushinp discards pending input -- identical to libncursesw.
oracle_method: link one ungetch/getch C program against libncurses_cabi.a and libncursesw; compare the codes getch returns from the pushed-back queue
